title: Add 21 tests for new bead introspection CLI surfaces
description: Add 21 new tests to tests/test_cli_bead.py covering all surfaces introduced by spec spec-df49daa7 per the spec Test Plan: (1) bead history default output — 3 entries, ascending timestamp, correct format; (2) history --limit 2; (3) history --event single; (4) history --event A --event B OR semantics; (5) history --json; (6) show --field scalar (status); (7) show --field nested object (handoff_summary.completed); (8) show --field array index (execution_history[-1].event); (9) show --field missing path exits non-zero, no stdout; (10) show --field object value pretty JSON; (11) list --status single; (12) list --status multi OR; (13) list --status invalid exits non-zero; (14) list --agent + --status AND; (15) list --agent invalid exits non-zero; (16) list --feature-root AND-wise; (17) show --field null value exits zero, empty line; (18) show --field bool value lowercase; (19) show --field int value; (20) show --field array OOB exits non-zero with length; (21) backwards-compat — no-flag list/show unchanged, --label still works.
acceptance_criteria: All 21 test cases from the spec Test Plan are implemented and named to match their number/description
uv run pytest tests/test_cli_bead.py -q passes with no failures
uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q passes with no regressions in existing tests
